Override.dn: Tattoo of the Kitava Heart Eater

Overrides.Override: Killing Blows have 4% chance to Consume corpses to recover 10% of Maximum Life
15% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Auras from your Skills which affect Allies also affect Enemies Limited to 1 Runegraft of Treachery
Your Lucky or Unlucky effects are instead Unexciting Limited to 1 Runegraft of Stability

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE The Iron Fortress Crusader Plate Armour: 1475 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.7447 Unique ID: 7e55b52ee69aab52ed4f868ec15af5147c3bf7dc8278f0198a9bb545d2646f6d Item Level: 84 Quality: 20 Sockets: W-W-W-W-W-W LevelReq: 59 Implicits: 0 +1% Chance to Block Attack Damage per 50 Strength Chance to Block Spell Damage is Unlucky +116 to Strength 84% increased Armour 10% reduced Movement Speed Strength's Damage Bonus instead grants 3% increased Melee Physical Damage per 10 Strength Corrupted
